Issues: The style and subject matter (magical unicorn/pegasus with constellations) are heavily inspired by popular, established fantasy media (e.g., My Little Pony). While the artwork itself appears to be original enough to avoid direct infringement, buyers familiar with these franchises may associate the art with copyrighted characters, which could lead to negative feedback or perceived IP issues. To mitigate risk, ensure the character design is distinctly non-referential or stylized enough to pass as a generic fantasy creature.
